title: The Verification Horizon: No Silver Bullet for Coding Agent Rewards
innovation_summary: The Verification Horizon: No Silver Bullet for Coding Agent Rewards: To address this, we characterize the quality of verification signals along three dimensions -- scalability, faithfulness, and robustness -- and argue that achieving all three simultaneously.
